subcodes.first_line: O thou handmaiden who art near unto God! Jinab-i-Fadil hath written concerning thy services to the daughters of his holiness Sadru's-Sudur [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز مقرب الهی جناب فاضل خدماتت را بصبایای حضرت صدرالصدور مرقوم نموده اند
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
